Klasse BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree<T>
Typparameter:
T - The bank object type, e.g., a patch or a multi type
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable
public class BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject> extends Object implements Serializable
A tree whose leaves are bank objects, e.g., patches or multis. There are three types of nodes:
  • Bank object nodes represent or contain a single bank object. They have a unique identifier in their bank node.
  • Bank nodes contain a list of bank object nodes. They have a globally unique identifier in the bank tree.
  • Tree nodes contain a list of tree nodes and/or a list of bank nodes. They have a unique identifier in their parent node.

Example 1: Patch Bank with Patch Data Model

   VZ1Patch vzPatch1 = …;
       ⋮
   VZ1Patch vzPatch192 = …;

   BankTree<VZ1Patch> patchBank = new BankTree<VZ1Patch>("Patch","VZ Factory Patches");
   patchBank.addBank("I","INTERNAL");
   patchBank.addBank("C(1)","CARD 1");
   patchBank.addBank("C(2)","CARD 2");

   patchBank.addBankObject("I","A-1",vzPatch1);
       ⋮
   patchBank.addBankObject("C(2)","H-8",vzPatch192);

   VZ1Patch patch = patchBank.getBankObject("I","B-7");
       ⋮

Example 2: Patch Bank without Patch Data Model:

   BankTree<BankTree.IBankObject> patchBank = new BankTree<BankTree.IBankObject>("Patch","VZ Factory Patches");
   patchBank.addBank("I","INTERNAL");
   patchBank.addBank("C(1)","CARD 1");
   patchBank.addBank("C(2)","CARD 2");

   patchBank.addBankObject("I","A-1","VZ EP");
       ⋮
   patchBank.addBankObject("C(2)","H-8","INIT VOICE");

   String patchName = patchBank.getBankObjectName("I","B-7");
       ⋮

Autor:
Matthias Wolff
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Verschachtelte Klassen - Übersicht

    Verschachtelte Klassen
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    class 
    BankTree.Bank
    Contains a list of bank object nodes in a bank tree.
    class 
    BankTree.BankObject
    Represents or contains a single bank object, e.g., a patch or a multi, in a bank.
    static interface 
    BankTree.IBankObject
    Interface to bank objects, e.g., patches or multis, stored in a bank tree.

    Methode
    Beschreibung
    BankTree<T>.Bank
    addBank(String bankUID, String bankName)
    Adds a bank to this tree.
    BankTree<T>.BankObject
    addBankObject(String bankUID, String objectUID, String objectName)
    Adds a bank object node without a bank object to a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees.
    BankTree<T>.BankObject

    Adds a bank object node with a bank object to a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees.

    addTree(String UID, String name)
    Adds a sub-tree to this tree.
    BankTree<T>.Bank

    Returns a bank in this tree.

    Returns a bank object in a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees.

    Returns the banks in this tree.

  • Felddetails

    • ROOT_UID

      public static final transient String ROOT_UID
      Unique identifier of the root node.
      Siehe auch:
      • Konstantenfeldwerte

  • Konstruktordetails

    • BankTree

      public BankTree(String objectType, String name)
      Creates a bank tree.
      Parameter:
      objectType - Human-readable type name of bank objects stored in this bank tree, e.g., "Patch" or "Multi"
      name - The name, can be null (discouraged)

  • Methodendetails

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Clears the list of tree children and the list of bank children.

    • getRoot

      public BankTree<T> getRoot()
      Returns the root node of the bank tree containing this node.
      Gibt zurück:
      The root node; this if this node is the root

    • getParent

      public BankTree<T> getParent()
      Returns the parent of this node.
      Gibt zurück:
      The parent node; null if this node is the root

    • getUID

      public String getUID()
      Returns the unique identifier of this node in its parent node.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this node.
      Gibt zurück:
      The name, may be null

    • addTree

      public BankTree<T> addTree(String UID, String name) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a sub-tree to this tree.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique identifier of the sub-tree in this tree
      name - The sub-tree name, can be null or empty (discouraged)
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly created tree node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if UID is null or empty, or not unique,

    • getTreeUIDs

      public List<String> getTreeUIDs()
      Returns the unique identifiers of the sub-trees of this tree.
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of tree UIDs, may be empty

    • getTrees

      public List<BankTree<T>> getTrees()
      Returns the sub-trees of this tree.
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of tree nodes, may be empty

    • getTree

      public BankTree<T> getTree(String UID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a sub-tree of this tree.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique identifier of the sub-tree
      Gibt zurück:
      The sub-tree node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if UID is null or empty, or if no such sub-tree exists

    • addBank

      public BankTree<T>.Bank addBank(String bankUID, String bankName) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a bank to this tree.
      Parameter:
      bankUID - The globally unique identifier in the bank tree
      bankName - The bank name, can be null or empty (discouraged)
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly created bank node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if bankUID is null or empty, or not globally unique,

    • getBankUIDs

      public List<String> getBankUIDs(boolean recursive)
      Returns the unique identifiers of the banks in this tree.
      Parameter:
      recursive - if true, the method recursively lists the bank UIDs in this tree and its sub-trees (if any); otherwise the method only lists the bank UIDs in this tree
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of bank UIDs, may be empty

    • getBanks

      public List<BankTree<T>.Bank> getBanks(boolean recursive)
      Returns the banks in this tree.
      Parameter:
      recursive - if true, the method recursively lists the banks in this tree and its sub-trees (if any); otherwise the method only lists the banks in this tree
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of bank nodes, may be empty

    • getBank

      public BankTree<T>.Bank getBank(String bankUID, boolean recursive) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a bank in this tree.
      Parameter:
      bankUID - The globally unique identifier in the bank tree
      recursive - if true, the method recursively searches the bank in this tree and its sub-trees (if any); otherwise the method only searches the bank in this tree
      Gibt zurück:
      The bank node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if bankUID is null or empty, or if no such bank exists

    • addBankObject

      public BankTree<T>.BankObject addBankObject(String bankUID, String objectUID, String objectName) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a bank object node without a bank object to a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees. Convenience shortcut for getBank (bankUID,true).addBankObject(objectUID,objectName).
      Parameter:
      bankUID - The globally unique bank identifier in the bank tree
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in the bank identified by bankUID
      objectName - The object name
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly created bank object node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • bankUID is null or empty, or no such bank exists, or
      • objectUID is null or empty, or not unique, or
      • objectName is null or empty

    • addBankObject

      public BankTree<T>.BankObject addBankObject(String bankUID, String objectUID, T object) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a bank object node with a bank object to a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees. Convenience shortcut for getBank(bankUID,true).addBankObject (objectUID,object).
      Parameter:
      bankUID - The globally unique bank identifier in the bank tree
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in the bank identified by bankUID
      object - The bank object
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly created bank object node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • bankUID is null or empty, or no such bank exists, or
      • objectUID is null or empty, or not unique, or
      • object is null

    • getBankObject

      public T getBankObject(String bankUID, String objectUID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a bank object in a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees. Convenience shortcut for getBank(bankUID,true).getBankObject(objectUID).
      Parameter:
      bankUID - The globally unique bank identifier in the bank tree
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in the bank identified by bankUID
      Gibt zurück:
      The bank object
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • bankUID is null or empty, or no such bank exists, or
      • objectUID is null or empty, or no such object exists in the bank identified by bankUID

    • getBankObjectName

      public String getBankObjectName(String bankUID, String objectUID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns the name of a bank object in a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees. Convenience shortcut for getBank(bankUID,true).getBankObjectName(objectUID).
      Parameter:
      bankUID - The globally unique bank identifier in the bank tree
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in the bank identified by bankUID
      Gibt zurück:
      The name
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • bankUID is null or empty, or no such bank exists, or
      • objectUID is null or empty, or no such object exists in the bank identified by bankUID

    • prettyPrint

      public String prettyPrint()
      Pretty-prints this node into a string.
      Gibt zurück:
      The string
